title: FeatherMorph
description: Yet another disguise plugin. Disguise as mobs and players, then acquire unique skills and abilities!
body:
Archived, feel free to fork, although I would suggest making your own, as there aren't many documents about this project :D ![cover](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/1.19.4/assets/cover.png)

A morph plugin for survival servers

[![GH Actions](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/MorphPlugin/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/actions) [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/XiaMoZhiShi/MorphPlugin.svg)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/releases/latest) [Client Integration](https://modrinth.com/mod/feathermorphclient) | [Wiki (WIP)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/wiki) | [中文介绍](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/blob/1.20.4/README.md)
## Features * Simple and easy to use * **Implemented disguise abilities and skills covering most of the vanilla features** * Change players' bounding box depending on their disguise ( !!!REQUIRES CLIENT INTEGRATION MOD!!! ) * **Enhance experiences with [Client Integration](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/MorphPluginClient)** - Currently: GUI disguise selection, action hotkeys, see your disguise on the client side, and see other's disguise if the server doesn't support displaying disguise on their side

* Translatable messages with [MiniMessage](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/index.html) support (Check our [Wiki](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/wiki/Language-files-(Messages-and-Localization)) for more information!) * ChatOverride - Masks away your name when chatting, available for player disguises * InteractionMirror - Make another player do the same thing as you did when disguising as them ## Dependencies * To run this plugin, you will need: **A Paper or Paper-based server** * These are required to display disguises on the server side: * For version **[2.x]**: *Latest PacketEvents* -> [CI](https://ci.codemc.io/job/retrooper/job/packetevents/) || [Release](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents/versions) * For version **[1.x / 0.13.1x]**: [*ProtocolLib*](https://ci.dmulloy2.net/job/ProtocolLib) * For version **[0.x]** [*LibsDisguises*](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/libs-disguises-free.81/) and [*ProtocolLib*](https://ci.dmulloy2.net/job/ProtocolLib) ## bStats [![bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/FeatherMorph.svg)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/FeatherMorph/18062)
